pageContext.name: <Side MS> RX-78GP03S Gundam GP03S ver. A.N.I.M.E.
pageContext.description: The RX-78GP03S Gundam GP0S3, core unit of the Dendrobium system, is ready to launch! Includes a full array of weapons. Beam saber hilts can be stored on the backpack and removed for battle. Even the folding manipulator arms work! Bazooka and shield also fold, faithful to the anime design.
